_schema.status: live | coming-soon. Live entries must have file.tag/name/sha256; the site build downloads the asset, verifies the sha256, and extracts name/description/instructions from the .adf itself. Coming-soon entries render from the curated fields here (no file yet).
_schema.naming: Agents get botanical given names (ash, sage, hazel, fern, ...). The family signature is the filename form: lowercase name + .adf. Job/role lives in tagline and category, never in the name.
_schema.capabilities: Curated disclosure of what the agent uses: channels, tools, mcp, sandbox (js|container|host), network. Shown on the agent page so people know what they're opening.

agents.tagline: A portable personal assistant that learns your environment and improves through use.

agents.name: sage
agents.tagline: A confidant that remembers you and never reports back to a company.
agents.description: Think out loud with something that knows your context. Sage keeps a long, private memory of what matters to you, entirely inside its file, on your machine.

agents.name: hazel
agents.tagline: Your money, kept private. Budgets and finds waste without anything leaving your machine.
agents.description: Hand hazel your statements and it budgets, spots waste, and answers “can I afford this?” — the financial questions you’d never type into someone else’s cloud.

agents.name: fern
agents.tagline: A notes agent that tends thousands of markdown docs living inside its file.
agents.description: Fern keeps your notes: organizing, linking, and answering across thousands of markdown documents stored inside the agent itself. A private knowledge base you own outright.
